name: wb/price-slider
description: Magento 2 Price Slider module — draggable price-range filter for category pages with full multi-store, multi-currency, and BSS MultiStoreViewPricing support.

suggest.bss-commerce/m2-multi-store-view-pricing: Enables per-store-view base currency pricing (catalog_product_index_price_store table).
suggest.bss-commerce/m2-pre-order: Enables 3-tier stock sort: In Stock > Pre-order/Made-to-Order > Out of Stock.
